title: phlox × hortorum
intro: Phlox × hortorum, commonly known as garden phlox, is a hybrid flowering plant that belongs to the phlox genus. The plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of garden phlox include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of garden phlox include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, but it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
